summary: Completed testing of Restaurant Features: Restaurant Portal Standalone, Restaurant Discovery, Restaurant Detail, Loyalty Program APIs. All 18 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend pages load correctly. Found 1 routing issue: duplicate /loyalty routes in App.js.

routing_issues.issue: Duplicate /loyalty routes - Line 364 (LoyaltyPage - protected) and Line 753 (LoyaltyDashboard - public). The second route is never reached.
routing_issues.suggestion: Change restaurant loyalty route to /restaurant-loyalty or /treueprogramm-restaurant

backend_api_tests.restaurants_discover: PASS - Returns list of restaurants with ratings, categories
backend_api_tests.restaurants_detail: PASS - Returns restaurant info, vouchers, reviews, stats
backend_api_tests.loyalty_levels: PASS - Returns 5 loyalty levels (Starter to Platinum)
backend_api_tests.portal_validate_invalid: PASS - Returns valid=false for invalid voucher
backend_api_tests.portal_admin_restaurants: PASS - Returns list of registered restaurants

frontend_tests.restaurant_portal_standalone: PASS - Loads without BidBlitz navbar/footer at /restaurant-portal
frontend_tests.discover_restaurants: PASS - Shows category filters, restaurant cards, search
frontend_tests.restaurant_detail: PASS - Shows restaurant info, rating, reviews tab, vouchers tab
frontend_tests.login_flow: PASS - Login works and redirects to dashboard
frontend_tests.loyalty_dashboard: PASS - Shows login prompt for unauthenticated users

action_items: Fix duplicate /loyalty route in App.js - LoyaltyDashboard (restaurant loyalty) should use a different route like /restaurant-loyalty
critical_code_review_comments: RestaurantPortal.js - Well implemented standalone page with QR scanner, login/register forms
DiscoverRestaurants.js - Good category filtering and restaurant display
RestaurantDetail.js - Complete restaurant page with tabs for info, vouchers, reviews
WriteReview.js - Good review form with star ratings, photo upload, recommendation toggle
LoyaltyDashboard.js - Good loyalty program UI but route conflict with LoyaltyPage.js
restaurant_discovery.py - Complete API with categories, featured, search, nearby functionality
restaurant_reviews.py - Review submission with bonus bids, helpful voting
loyalty_program.py - 5 levels, 8 challenges, leaderboard, streak tracking
restaurant_portal.py - QR validation, voucher redemption, dashboard, admin endpoints
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - using existing restaurant data (Sushi Garden, Café Zentral, Pizza Roma, Istanbul Kebab, etc.)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Restaurant features are fully functional. All APIs working. Restaurant Portal standalone page renders without BidBlitz navbar/footer. Discover Restaurants shows category filters and restaurant cards. Restaurant Detail shows info, vouchers, reviews. One routing issue: duplicate /loyalty routes - LoyaltyPage (auction loyalty) and LoyaltyDashboard (restaurant loyalty) both use /loyalty route. The restaurant loyalty dashboard is unreachable due to this conflict.
